question: How does blockchain improve supply chain transparency?
answer:
Blockchain technology enhances supply chain transparency by providing immutable records and real-time visibility.

Recommended Solutions:
Digital Security Approval & Audit Trail (#11): Records approvals and validations for accountability; Reduces dependency on manual documentation processes; Enhances traceability of supply chain transactions
Unified Data Lake & Integration Layer (#60): Creates a single source of digital truth across operations; Integrates various systems for comprehensive visibility; Facilitates real-time data sharing among stakeholders

Similar Deployments:
ABG Trading (port) — Implemented automated workflows to improve visibility and reduce manual errors.
Apcotex (chemical) — Deployed a unified digital logistics solution for real-time tracking and compliance.
